whatItIs: A legal name-change petition/order is a public court record. It ties your former and current name together and is routinely indexed by data brokers and search engines — often the single most durable deadname source.
actions: Check whether California offers a confidential / sealed name change for safety-at-risk petitioners (e.g. survivors of abuse or stalking) and whether you qualify.
Where permitted, request sealing or redaction of the existing record.
Suppress downstream copies: Google 'Results about you', broker opt-outs, and archive removal requests.
disclaimer: Informational only — not legal advice; sealing rules and eligibility vary by court and change over time. Verify with a name-change-experienced legal-aid org.
